### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containernetworking/plugins (github.com/containernetworking/plugins)</summary>

### [`v1.9.1`](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/releases/tag/v1.9.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/compare/v1.9.0...v1.9.1)

This is a patch release with dependency updates and some minor fixes.

#### Minor fixes

- bandwidth: handle nil bandwidth in CHECK by [@​squeed](https://redirect.github.com/squeed) in [#​1222](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1222)
- vrf: fix route filtering to preserve IPAM-configured routes by [@​mlguerrero12](https://redirect.github.com/mlguerrero12) in [#​1227](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1227)
- CVE-2025-52881: Bump selinux to 1.13.0 by [@​sbiradar10](https://redirect.github.com/sbiradar10) in [#​1231](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1231)
- bridge: include attempted IP address in AddrAdd error message by [@​Amulyam24](https://redirect.github.com/Amulyam24) in [#​1225](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1225)

#### New Contributors

- [@​sbiradar10](https://redirect.github.com/sbiradar10) made their first contribution in [#​1231](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1231)
- [@​Amulyam24](https://redirect.github.com/Amulyam24) made their first contribution in [#​1225](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1225)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/compare/v1.9.0...v1.9.1>

</details>

comments.body: @lsm5 is working on removing this dep with the CNI removal so we do not need to bump this and give him another merge conflict

### Renovate Ignore Notification

Because you closed this PR without merging, Renovate will ignore this update (`v1.9.1`). You will get a PR once a newer version is released. To ignore this dependency forever, add it to the `ignoreDeps` array of your Renovate config.
